name: Nuisance
playerFacingDescription: No formal response. Minor diplomatic side-eye.

name: Irritant
playerFacingDescription: Foreign orgs begin increasing border security. Espionage attempts increase.

name: Threat
playerFacingDescription: Resistance movements emerge. CPU aggression toward your empire increases.

name: Menace
playerFacingDescription: Hero organizations begin to form. International coalitions discuss 'the problem.'

name: Supervillain
playerFacingDescription: Active hero teams deploy. The World Police mobilizes.

name: Apocalyptic
playerFacingDescription: All non-empire orgs treat your empire as their primary threat. Maximum response.
